title: listera ovata
intro: Listera ovata, also known as twayblade, is a perennial orchid native to woodland areas in North America and Europe. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Listera ovata include its potential to treat a variety of ailments such as sore throats, bronchitis, and fever, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve menstrual cramps. Listera ovata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties.
